hero.title: Midimu ya bantu bonso
hero.lead: Mu mukanda eu mudi liste wa midimu ya bantu bonso idibu balombola ku diambuluisha dia tshibambalu tshia IATF.

intro: Mifundu idibu bitaba idi mu dibeji edi padibu bayipatula.

header.title: Kukudimuna dijinga dilelela dia kuikala ne mushindu wa kufika ku miaba idi bantu ba bungi

paragraphs: IATF udi utangila majinga masunguluke adi atangila mushindu wa kupeta mikanda idi mua kulua mikanda idi bantu bonso mua kubala.

emptyState.title: Kakuena mudimu udibu banji kupatula to
paragraphs: Tshibambalu tshidibu babikila ne: IATF tshidi tshilongolola mudimu wabu wa kumpala bua bantu bonso.
Nansha nanku udi mua kutuma dilomba edi biwikala dijinga ne mushindu wa kufika ku muaba uudi uya.
